feature.title: ChatBot Operator Lifecycle Management
feature.description: Manage chat bot lifecycles as Kubernetes resources
feature.as_a: Platform Engineering or Application Development team member
feature.i_want: manage chat bot lifecycles as Kubernetes resources
feature.so_that: I can automate bot provisioning, configuration, and management

steps.text: the ChatBot Operator is deployed in RKE2 cluster with Linkerd
the operator has proper RBAC/ABAC permissions
I have a valid ChatBot manifest for platform "slack"
I apply the ChatBot manifest to Kubernetes
the ChatBot resource should be created successfully
